name: Minted Melon Mold
recipeIngredient: Garnishes: Mint Leaves and More Melon Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the melon balls by using Cantaloupe, Honeydews, or other desired melons.
2. Prepare the garnishes by adding mint leaves and more melon balls if desired.
3. In a medium bowl, pour boiling water over gelatin; stir until dissolved.
4. Add lime juice, cold water, and peppermint extract to the bowl; chill until partially set.
5. Gently fold in the prepared melon balls.
6. Pour the mixture into a lightly oiled 5-cup ring mold.
7. Chill until set, about 3 hours or overnight.
8. Unmold onto lettuce leaves.
9. Serve with coconut cream dressing and garnish with mint leaves and/or additional melon balls if desired.
